calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner William Gargano, Clerk: Carla Amador CSR: Susan Crozier #4761 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, Theresa Lynne Murphy, is present in propria persona.
Plaintiff's witness, Kathy Garibaldi, is present.

Defendant, Clyde Nathan Smith, is not present.
(Default was entered on 12/5/07 as to the defendant)

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Theresa Lynne Murphy is sworn and testifies on her own behalf. Kathy Garibaldi is sworn and testifies on behalf of the plaintiff.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant, Clyde Nathan Smith. The Court finds Theresa Lynne Murphy to be owner of the property located at 11 High Street #201, San Francisco, CA 94114. Theresa Lynne Murphy's name is to be added on the Grant Deed and defaulted defendant's name is to be removed. The Court of the Clerk to sign the Grant Deed on behalf of the defaulted defendant. Order to be submitted to the Court for signature.
